commands.review_summary:
The PR adds first-class project workspaces across Gateway `projects.*` RPCs, shared SQLite state, agent prompt-context injection, and a new Control UI Projects surface with roles, linked chats, documents, and language controls.

PR surface: Source +8234, Tests +2470, Generated +191. Total +10895 across 40 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defects by source inspection: the store pre-filters selected documents out of prompt records, and the prompt path can synchronously summarize local files; no runtime proof was run in this read-only review.
